ddls:
CREATE TABLE "production_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the well from which the data was collected */,
  "production_date" TEXT /* Date on which the production data was recorded */,
  "gas_volume" REAL /* Volume of gas produced in MMscf */,
  "water_volume" INTEGER /* Volume of water produced in stb */,
  "casing_pressure" REAL /* Casing pressure in psi(a) */,
  "tubing_pressure" REAL /* Tubing pressure in psi(a) */,
  "calculated_sandface_pressure" REAL /* Calculated sandface pressure in psi(a) */,
  "gas_volume_cumulative" REAL /* Cumulative volume of gas produced in MMscf */,
  "oil_volume" REAL /* Volume of oil produced in barrels */,
  "oil_volume_cumulative" REAL /* Cumulative volume of oil produced in barrels */,
  "production_comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes about the production data */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., SCADA, manual entry) */,
  "data_quality_flag" INTEGER /* Flag to indicate the quality of the data (e.g., 0 for good, 1 for suspect) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_production_data_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "well_name" TEXT /* Name of the well */,
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the field where the well is located */,
  "country" INTEGER /* Country where the well is located */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the well (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "well_type" TEXT /* Type of well (e.g., vertical, horizontal, directional) */,
  "well_depth" INTEGER /* Depth of the well in feet */,
  "drilling_date" TEXT /* Date when the well was drilled */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "well_head_pressure" REAL /* Pressure at the wellhead in psi(a) */,
  "well_status_date" TEXT /* Date when the well status was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_field_id FOREIGN KEY ("field_id") REFERENCES fields ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_country FOREIGN KEY ("country") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fields" (
  "field_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each field */,
  "field_name" TEXT /* Name of the field */,
  "country" INTEGER /* Country where the field is located */,
  "operator" INTEGER /* Operator responsible for the field */,
  "field_size" REAL /* Size of the field in square miles */,
  "field_discovery_date" TEXT /* Date when the field was discovered */,
  "field_production_start_date" TEXT /* Date when production started in the field */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("field_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fields_operator FOREIGN KEY ("operator") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the country is located */,
  "country_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the operator */,
  "operator_type" TEXT /* Type of operator (e.g., private, government) */,
  "operator_headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the operator's headquarters */,
  "operator_website" TEXT /* Website of the operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, data scientist, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user within the company */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES production_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry used for the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., daily, monthly, ad-hoc) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, finalized, approved) */,
  "report_comments" TEXT /* Any comments or notes about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES production_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set up the alert */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well to be monitored */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., pressure, volume) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold value for triggering the alert */,
  "notification_email" TEXT /* Email address to receive notifications */,
  "alert_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "alert_last_triggered" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was last triggered */,
  "alert_reset_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the alert was last reset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry used for the prediction */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the machine learning model used */,
  "prediction_date" TEXT /* Date when the prediction was made */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value based on the model */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_method" TEXT /* Method used for the prediction (e.g., regression, classification) */,
  "prediction_accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the prediction (e.g., RMSE, MAE) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES production_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the machine learning model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "model_creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was created */,
  "model_last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the model was last updated */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)
